name: Suspicious SMB Named Pipe Access Detected
description: Unusual access or creation of an SMB named pipe detected, which can indicate inter-process communication for malicious purposes such as lateral movement, data exfiltration, or command and control.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the named pipe event.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: SubjectUserName
parameters.description: The user account associated with the named pipe access or creation.

parameters.name: PipeName
parameters.description: The name of the SMB named pipe involved in the event.

parameters.name: ProcessName
parameters.description: The name of the process that accessed or created the named pipe.
